blocks.description: Program header with change history, OPTIONS for macro debugging and compression, LIBNAME for ODBC source (srcdb with Oracle DSN), staging, warehouse, target, archive, and control libraries, global job control variables (%LET for job_name, run_id, status, rc, process_dt, n_src_tables)
%INCLUDE for etl_utilities.sas shared extraction and audit macro library

%MACRO extract_table: extracts source data into staging with optional WHERE filter; validates source existence via %SYSFUNC(EXIST), captures row count via CALL SYMPUTX, logs extraction metadata to ctrl.extraction_log via PROC SQL

%MACRO scd_type2_merge opening: documentation header, declaration with 4 parameters (dim, stage, natural_key, tracked_cols), local variables, and setup for dynamic change detection expression building

%DO loop inside scd_type2_merge building dynamic change_expr from tracked_cols: iterates over column list using COUNTW/SCAN, constructs OR-chained COALESCE/STRIP/PUT comparison expressions for SCD change detection

PROC SQL inside scd_type2_merge classifying records as NEW/CHANGED/UNCHANGED via LEFT JOIN with dynamic change_expr CASE expression; captures classification counts into macro variables &new_cnt, &upd_cnt, &unchanged_cnt
%IF &upd_cnt > 0 conditional inside scd_type2_merge: PROC SQL UPDATE expiring changed dimension rows by setting current_flag='N' and effective_to=process_dt with updated_by/updated_ts audit fields

%IF &new_cnt > 0 OR &upd_cnt > 0 conditional inside scd_type2_merge: PROC SQL INSERT of new dimension versions with surrogate key generation via MONOTONIC(), effective_from/to dates, current_flag='Y', and audit fields (created_by, created_ts)
PROC SQL inside scd_type2_merge inserting dimension load metrics into ctrl.dimension_load_log; PROC DATASETS cleanup of work._scd2_classified; %MEND scd_type2_merge

%MACRO fact_load: loads fact table from staging with dimension key lookups; uses dynamic PROC SQL with %DO loops to build surrogate key JOINs from dim_keys parameter (natural_key=dim_table pairs); appends to target and logs to ctrl.fact_load_log
PROC SQL retrieving last successful watermark value from ctrl.watermark_table for incremental extraction; defaults to 1900-01-01 via COALESCE

%MACRO extract_all_sources with %DO loop iterating over 5 source tables (customers, products, orders, order_lines, suppliers) using indexed macro arrays; calls %extract_table for each with watermark-based incremental filter; includes %IF error check with early %RETURN on failure
Invocation of %extract_all_sources to execute the incremental extraction loop
%IF &job_rc NE 0 abort check: logs extraction phase failure and %GOTO EXIT_PROGRAM to skip remaining pipeline steps

DATA step transforming staging.stg_customers: name standardization via PROPCASE, null handling for phone/email, status code mapping (A/I/S/C to descriptive labels), date string-to-numeric conversion via INPUT, and country code enrichment
DATA step transforming staging.stg_products: null handling for cost/price fields, margin percentage derivation, and product category/subcategory standardization via PROPCASE
Three PROC SORT steps deduplicating staging tables: stg_customers_clean, stg_products_clean, and stg_orders using NODUPKEY by natural key columns
%scd_type2_merge invocation for customer dimension: merging staging.stg_customers_dedup into whouse.dim_customer tracking first_name, last_name, email, phone, customer_status, country_name
%scd_type2_merge invocation for product dimension: merging staging.stg_products_dedup into whouse.dim_product tracking category, subcategory, unit_cost, list_price, margin_pct
%scd_type2_merge invocation for supplier dimension: merging staging.stg_suppliers into whouse.dim_supplier tracking supplier_name, contact_name, city, state, country_code

PROC SQL performing dimension key lookups: joins staging.stg_orders_dedup with whouse.dim_customer, dim_product, dim_supplier, and dim_date (via stg_order_lines) to resolve surrogate keys for fact table loading
PROC SQL identifying orphaned dimension keys: creates staging.orphan_keys for orders missing customer, product, or date dimension matches; captures count into &orphan_count
%IF &orphan_count > 0 conditional: emits WARNING messages about orders with missing dimension keys and directs to staging.orphan_keys for investigation

DATA step preparing fact staging from staging.orders_with_keys: excludes orphaned records, calculates derived measures (line_total, discount_amt, net_amount, tax_amount, gross_amount) with null-safe COALESCE for discount_pct and tax_rate
%fact_load invocation for order fact table: loads staging.fact_orders_stage into whouse.fact_orders with customer and product dimension key lookups
%fact_load invocation for returns fact table: loads staging.stg_returns into whouse.fact_returns with customer and product dimension key lookups
DATA step creating ctrl.watermark_update with job_name, process_dt as watermark_value, COMPLETE status, and datetime timestamp for incremental load checkpoint
PROC APPEND adding watermark_update to ctrl.watermark_table with FORCE option; %PUT confirmation message

%IF &syserr NE 0 OR &job_rc NE 0 error handling: sets job_status=FAILED, inserts error details into ctrl.error_log via PROC SQL, writes error flag file via DATA _null_; %ELSE sets job_status=COMPLETE with confirmation message
PROC SQL inserting job completion record into ctrl.job_status_log with run_id, job_name, status, process_date, start/end times, and tables_processed count
Two PROC DATASETS steps: first deletes all staging datasets (13 tables including stg_*, orders_with_keys, orphan_keys, fact_orders_stage); second kills all WORK library datasets
DATA _null_ with CALL EXECUTE for dynamic post-processing: conditionally generates %PUT notification and FILENAME EMAIL for failure alerts based on &job_status value
%EXIT_PROGRAM label for error-path jumps, reset OPTIONS to nomprint/nomlogic/nosymbolgen, and final %PUT messages with completion timestamp and job status
